content: By integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms into the iterative Self-Refine framework, we can break the loop of incremental local optimization that plagues standard single-perspective Self-Refine, unlocking more dramatic quality gains without adding any additional training or external data requirements. This hybrid approach leverages the ability of multi-perspective reflection to expose hidden flaws that a single self-feedback loop would overlook, while retaining Self-Refine's key advantage of working off-the-shelf with existing LLMs.
